SEARCH

Index

A B C D E F G I J L P R S T V 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

G

getAdditional() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Gets any optional additional information you have chosen to provide
getAdditional(int) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
present the options and get the users choice returning the additional text for that choice.
getChoice(int) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Present the options and get the users input returning the option text for that choice If not already done triggers the process of handling sort, adding abandons etc, and makes the list read only.
getChoiceDescription(Integer) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Get the choice description for the specified index, if the index is null negative or more than the number of descriptions (this counts from zero) then null is returned.
getChoicesString() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
scan all of the options and get their choice strings, combine them and return If not already done triggers the process of handling sort, adding abandons etc, and makes the list read only.
getCommandName() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.RunnableCommand
gets the name of the command
getCurrentDirectoryName() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
getter for currentDirectoryName
getData(boolean) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
returns the "display" text, if separateFields it true then the output is split by the FIELD_SEPARATOR, if it's false then the option, description and additional are just concatenated together
getData(int) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
get the combined data (option, description and additional) for the option at that index, if it's the abandon option then only the text is returned.
getDefaultOption() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
gets the default option
getDefaultOptionNumber() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
gets the number of the default option
getDefaultPauseString() - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
gets the default pause string
getDescription() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Gets the optional description field, for example you may want to provide a description of an option
getDescription(int) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Present the options and get the users input returning the associated description for that choice.
getDirectory(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a string representing a directory which can be relative or absolute, ensures that the entered string represents an existing directory (not a file) and if it's not then requests another go
getDirectory(String, String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a string representing a directory which can be relative or absolute, ensures that the entered string represents an existing directory (not a file) and if it's not then requests another go, if the user enters an empty string then the defaultValue is used
getDouble(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getInt(prompt) but returns a double
getDouble(String, double) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
See getInt(prompt, defaultValue) but returns a double
getDouble(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, double, double) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getInt(prompt, type, lower, upper) but returns a double
getDouble(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, double, double, boolean, double) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getIntBase(prompt, type, lower, upper, useDefault, useDefault, defaultValue) but returns a double
getDouble(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, double, double, double) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getInt(prompt, type, lower, upper, defaultValue) but returns a double
getFile(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a string representing a file name and path which can be relative or absolute, ensures that the entered string represents an existing file (not a directory) if it's not a file then requests another go
getFile(String, String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a string representing a file name and path which can be relative or absolute, ensures that the entered string represents an existing file (not a directory) if it's not a file then requests another go, if the user enters and empty string then the defaultValue is used
getFileMatching(String, String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a string representing a file name and path which can be absolute ot relative to the starting location where the filename element (last part of the path) must match the regular expression, ensures that the entered string represents an existing file (not a directory) if it's not a file then requests another go
getFileMatching(String, String, String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a string representing a file name and path which can be absolute or relative to the starting location where the filename element (last part of the path) must match the regular expression, ensures that the entered string represents an existing file (not a directory) if it's not a file then requests another go, if the user enters and empty string then the defaultValue is used.
getFileUnder(String, String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a string representing a file name and path which must be relative to the starting location, ensures that the entered string represents an existing file (not a directory) if it's not a file then requests another go
getFileUnder(String, String, String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a string representing a file name and path which must be relative to the starting location, ensures that the entered string represents an existing file (not a directory) if it's not a file then requests another go, if the user enters and empty string then the defaultValue is used
getInt(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter an integer in base 10, this is parsed and if that fails then the user is re-prompted, if the parsing succeeds then the entered number is returned to the caller
getInt(String, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter an integer in base 10, this is parsed and if that fails then the user is re-prompted, if the parsing succeeds then the entered number is returned to the caller.
getInt(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, int, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompt the user to enter a base 10 integer number relative to the upper / lower, if no number is entered then the user is prompted to have another go
getInt(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, int, int, boolean, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompt the user to enter a base 10 integer number relative to the upper / lower, if no number is entered then the default value is used.
getInt(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, int, int, boolean, int, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompt the user to enter an arbitrary base integer number relative to the upper / lower, if no number is entered then the default value is used.
getInt(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, int, int, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompt the user to enter a base 10 integer number relative to the upper / lower, if no number is entered then the default value is used
getIntBase(String, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter an integer in an arbitrary base, this is parsed and if that fails then the user is re-prompted, if the parsing succeeds then the entered number is returned to the caller
getIntBase(String, int, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter an integer in an arbitrary base, this is parsed and if that fails then the user is re-prompted, if the parsing succeeds then the entered number is returned to the caller.
getIntBase(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, int, int, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompt the user to enter an arbitrary base integer number relative to the upper / lower, if no number is entered then the user is prompted to have another go
getIntBase(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, int, int, int, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompt the user to enter an arbitrary base integer number relative to the upper / lower, if no number is entered then the default value is used
getIntChoice(String, String[]) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options array.
getIntChoice(String, String[], String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options array.
getIntChoice(String, Collection<String>) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options collection.
getIntChoice(String, Collection<String>, String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options collection.
getIntChoice(String, ChoiceDescriptionData<?>) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the choice description data entries.
getIntHex(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter an integer in base 16 (hex), this is parsed and if that fails then the user is re-prompted, if the parsing succeeds then the entered number is returned to the caller
getIntHex(String, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter an integer in base 16 (hex), this is parsed and if that fails then the user is re-prompted, if the parsing succeeds then the entered number is returned to the caller.
getIntHex(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, int, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompt the user to enter a base 16 (HEX) integer number relative to the upper / lower, if no number is entered then the user is prompted to have another go
getIntHex(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, int, int, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompt the user to enter a base 16 (HEX) integer number relative to the upper / lower, if no number is entered then the default value is used
getISODate(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompts the user to enter a date with any allowed date, the current local date is used as the default.
getISODate(String, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompts the user to enter a date, which the current local date is used as the default.
getISODateTime(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a data and time (but no time zone) returns a string in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm Attempts to ensure that the entered data is valid (e.g.
getISODateTime(String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a data and time (but no time zone) returns a string in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm if askForTimezone is true then prompts for the timezone to use e.g.
getISODateTimeTimeZone(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
ask for the date / time with a timezone requested by name and offering a default of the current TZ
getISODateTimeTimeZone(String, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a data and time (in whatever TZ) and returns a string in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:SS If you are using a timezone then the time entered should be in the local time for that timezone, not that for some name based timezones e.g.
getISODateTimeTimeZone(String, boolean, boolean, boolean, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a data and time (in whatever TZ) and returns a string in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:SS If you are using a timezone then the time entered should be in the local time for that timezone, not that for some name based timezones e.g.
getISODateTimeTimeZone(String, ZoneId) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a full date, time and in the specified time zone
getISODateTimeTimeZone(String, ZoneId, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter the data and time in the specified timezone where the entered data must be >= mindtg and <= maxdtg
getISOLocalDate(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompts the user to enter a date , which the current local date is used as the default.
getISOLocalDate(String, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompts the user to enter a date , which the current local date is used as the default.
getISOLocalDateTime(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a data and time (but no time zone) returns a string in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm if askForTimezone is true then prompts for the timezone to use e.g.
getISOLocalTime(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompts the user to enter a time in 24 hours format, the current local time is used as the default.
getISOLocalTime(String, LocalTime, LocalTime) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompts the user to enter a time in 24 hours format, the current local time is used as the default the time must be within the mintime and max time The return string is of the format HH:MM:SS
getISOOffsetTimeZoneOffset(String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
prompts for an offset from GMT in terms of hours an mins, the resulting string will be 01:00 (in the case of british summer time which is 1 hours ahead of GMT, or 04:30) for India which is 4 1/2 hours ahead.
getISOTime(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompts the user to enter a time in 24 hours format, the current local time is used as the default The return string is of the format HH:MM:SS
getISOTime(String, LocalTime, LocalTime) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Prompts the user to enter a time in 24 hours format, the current local time is used as the default The return string is of the format HH:MM:SS
getISOTimeZoneOffset(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
prompts for an offset from GMT in terms of hours an mins, the resulting string will be 01:00 (in the case of british summer time which is 1 hours ahead of GMT, or 04:30) for India which is 4 1/2 hours ahead.
getISOTimeZoneOffset(String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
prompts for an offset from GMT in terms of hours an mins, the resulting string will be 01:00 (in the case of british summer time which is 1 hours ahead of GMT, or 04:30) for India which is 4 1/2 hours ahead.
getISOZonedDateTime(String, boolean, boolean, boolean, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a data and time (in the local or whatever TZ they enter) in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:SS If you are asking for a timezone then the time entered should be in the local time for that timezone, not that for some name based timezones e.g.
getISOZonedDateTimeTimeZone(String, ZoneId, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter the data and time in the specified timezone where the entered data must be >= mindtg and <= maxdtg
getLong(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a long value and returns a Long
getLong(String, long) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a long value, but if they press return with no input returns the default
getLong(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, long, long) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getInt(prompt, type, lower, upper) but returns a Long
getLong(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, long, long, boolean, long) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getIntBase(prompt, type, lower, upper, useDefault, useDefault, defaultValue) but returns a Long
getLong(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, long, long, boolean, long, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getLongBase(prompt, type, lower, upper, useDefault, defaultValue, base) but returns a Long
getLong(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, long, long, long) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getInt(prompt, type, lower, upper, defaultValue) but returns a Long
getLongBase(String, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a number in an arbitrary base (specified by the base param) and returns it as a long
getLongBase(String, long, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a number in an arbitrary base (specified by the base param) and returns it as a long
getLongBase(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, long, long, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getInt(prompt, type, lower, upper, base) but returns a Long
getLongBase(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, long, long, long, int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getIntBase(prompt, type, lower, upper, defaultValue, base) but returns a Long
getLongHex(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a hexadecimal value and returns it as a long
getLongHex(String, long) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to enter a hex value and returns as a long, but if they just press return returns the default
getLongHex(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, long, long) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getIntHex(prompt, type, lower, upper) but returns a Long
getLongHex(String, TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE, long, long, long) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
see getIntHex(prompt, type, lower, upper, defaultValue) but returns a Long
getName() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry
get the name of the entry (relative to it's parent only)
getNameType() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry
get the type and name as a string, e.g.
getOption() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Gets the value of the option for this ChoiceDescription (usually this is the string that will be displayed when using the chooser)
getParam() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Gets the optional param object, this allows you to easily associate an object with a choice, enabling the object to be easily determined based on a particular choice
getParam(int) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
present the otpions and get the users choice returning the param object for that choice If not already done triggers the process of handling sort, adding abandons etc, and makes the list read only.
getParamChoice(String, ChoiceDescriptionData<T>) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the choices in the choice description data, asks the user to enter a number representing the choice.
getParentDirectoryName() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
getter for parentDirectoryName
getPath() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry
get the path object representing this entry
getString(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Outputs the prompt and then waits for the user to enter zero or more characters which are then returned.
getString(String, String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the provided prompt and asks for input.
getString(String, String[]) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
List the options and ask the user to enter a number representing the option they want, the string selected is returned
getString(String, String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the provided prompt and asks for input.
getStringChoice(String, String[]) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options array.
getStringChoice(String, String[], Integer) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options array.
getStringChoice(String, String[], String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options array.
getStringChoice(String, Collection<String>) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options collection.
getStringChoice(String, Collection<String>, Integer) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options collection.
getStringChoice(String, Collection<String>, String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the options collection.
getStringChoice(String, ChoiceDescriptionData<?>) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt, then the strings in the choice description data entries.
getTimeZoneByName(String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Asks the user to select a timezone by name, if they press return and defaultToCurrentTimeZOne is true then the current TZ is used
getTimeZoneNameByName(String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Gets the name of a timezone
getType() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry
get the type of the entry, used to help know what the path points to
getTypeName() - Method in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry.Type
get the type as a nice name
getYN(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt and asks the user to enter y or n (case insensitive) if y is entered then true is returned, if n then false, if the input is neither y or n then the user is re-asked for input.
getYN(String, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Displays the prompt and asks the user to enter y or n (case insensitive) if y is entered then true is returned, if n then false, if the input is neither y or n then the user is re-asked for input.

All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values
